capabilities.name: Blast radius analysis
capabilities.guidance: Run codegraph_blast BEFORE editing any function used elsewhere. Shows all callers that would break.
anti_patterns: Do NOT skip blast radius for 'small' changes — cross-file impact is invisible without it.

capabilities.name: Architecture overview
capabilities.guidance: Run codegraph_brief at task start for architecture context.

capabilities.name: Caller chain analysis
capabilities.guidance: Run codegraph_callers to trace who calls a function before renaming or changing its signature.

capabilities.name: Callee chain analysis
capabilities.guidance: Run codegraph_callees to understand what a function depends on before refactoring.

capabilities.name: File dependency analysis
capabilities.guidance: Run codegraph_depends before moving, renaming, or restructuring files.

capabilities.name: Symbol search
capabilities.guidance: Run codegraph_search to find symbols by name or kind across the codebase.

capabilities.name: Index status
capabilities.guidance: Run codegraph_status to check whether the index is current before querying.
